title: oxalis fragilis
intro: Oxalis fragilis, also known as the fragile wood sorrel, is a perennial plant belonging to the Oxalis genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Oxalis fragilis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy in folk medicine. Oxalis fragilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
